settings.heading: Treats, toys & love for the whole pack
settings.subheading: Curated pet essentials inspired by three rescue pups. Every wag, woof, and order helps fund animal rescues we love.

settings.heading: Tail-wagging favorites
settings.subheading: Hand-picked goodies our pack approves of.

settings.name: Jack
settings.bio: His previous owners traveled often for work and couldn't give him the attention he needed. Today, Jack is the calmest member of the pack and an expert sunbeam-finder.

settings.name: Sophie
settings.bio: Sophie was left behind during quarantine — her previous family said they couldn't keep her. Their loss; our luckiest day. She greets everyone like a long-lost friend.

settings.name: Molly
settings.bio: Molly's first owners couldn't afford to care for her. She came to us scared and unsure — now she's pure goofy puppy joy and the reason we started this shop.

settings.heading: Together, the pack has given back
settings.subheading: Every order chips in. Here's the impact this community has made so far:

settings.text: Salmon treats are a HIT in my house. Bonus points for the cute packaging and the donation to rescues!
settings.author: Sarah M.

settings.text: Such warm, thoughtful packaging. You can tell real pet parents are behind this brand. Will absolutely reorder.
settings.author: Marcus T.

settings.text: Knowing 1% goes to rescues makes every purchase feel meaningful. Plus, the harness fits my pup perfectly!
settings.author: Priya K.

settings.heading: Frequently asked
settings.subheading: Quick answers from real humans (and one drooling dog).

settings.question: How fast do orders ship?
settings.answer: Most orders leave our hands within 1–3 business days. Once shipped, you'll get a tracking link to obsess over (we do too).

settings.question: Do you offer free shipping?
settings.answer: Yes! Spend $50 or more and shipping is on us within the U.S. Otherwise, flat-rate shipping is calculated at checkout.

settings.question: What's your return policy?
settings.answer: 30-day, no-questions-asked returns on unused items. If your pup didn't approve, send it back and we'll make it right.

settings.question: How does the 1% donation work?
settings.answer: We automatically set aside 1% of every order's revenue. At the end of each month we hand-pick a small, trusted pet rescue and donate the full amount — then post the receipt on Instagram.

settings.question: Can I cancel or change my order?
settings.answer: Reach out to support@mollyandsophie.com within 12 hours of placing your order and we'll do everything we can to update or cancel it before it ships.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Currently we only ship within the United States, but international shipping is on the roadmap. Sign up for our newsletter to be the first to know.
